data.name: Echoes of the Town
data.detailed_description:
明美在國外留學多年後終於返鄉。 她不知道的是，當市長質詢她必須償還的巨額債務時，她的返鄉之旅出現了意想不到的變化。

明美必須想辦法還債，這讓她必須兼職工作。 透過工作，玩家可以賺取寶貴的工作經驗，解鎖新的工作機會，並為曉美提供其他還債方法。

她離家這段時間，究竟發生了什麼事？ 在明美朝著目標努力的過程中，她很快就發現自己被牽扯進了許多涉及鎮民的謎團之中。 疑雲密佈的小鎮所帶來的連串事件將永遠改變曉美的一生。

  • 手工製動畫-完全手工打造的2D性愛動畫！

  • 沙盒玩法-塞滿支線任務跟隱藏秘密的城市等著探索！

  • 充滿張力的故事-峰迴路轉的劇情，撲朔離迷！

  • 萬事通-用"各種方法"賺錢吧！

data.short_description: 沙盒還債RPG。明美碰上麻煩了！她父親過世，還留下一筆龐大的債務！為了守護兒時的故居，明美必須賺錢！而且盡快！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Echoes of the Town
data.detailed_description:
Akemi is finally coming back to her hometown after years of studying abroad. Little does she know, her homecoming takes an unexpected turn when the mayor confronts her with an outrageous debt that must be paid.

Akemi must find a way to pay off her debt, leading her to take up part-time jobs. By working, players earn valuable work experience, unlocking new job opportunities, and providing Akemi with the means to repay her debt.

However, just what happened while she was away from home? As Akemi works towards her goal, she soon finds herself pulling at the thread of a number of mysteries involving the townsfolk. There is a shadow that looms over the town, and events are put into motion which will change Akemi's life forever.

  • HAND CRAFTED ANIMATIONS- Fully animated 2D sprite sex scenes!

  • SANDBOX GAMEPLAY- A city filled with missions to complete and secrets to uncover!

  • THRILLING STORY- Twists, turns, & revelations, there is more than meets the eye here.

  • JACK OF ALL TRADES- Work at a variety of part-time jobs to make cash!

data.short_description: Sandbox Debt Repayment RPG. Akemi is in trouble- her father has passed away, leaving her with the responsibility of paying off the debt on his estate! In order to save her childhood home, Akemi must make some CASH, and FAST!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • Processor: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • Graphics: Integrated Graphics
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
